testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.auth.AuthLoginIntegrationTest

testcase.name: login is case-insensitive on the email()
login returns 401 when password is wrong()
login returns 200 with signed JWT for valid credentials()
login returns 401 when email is not registered()
